text.message: All that Wheat pointless  with a 4 ore and no wheat port
3:1 port with brick port if 3 hits

Also, you did give red a sick set up
Nothing I can do. 693 is losing, just faster
Ill spare u black with the plow lol
No point in making us all weak for red to steam roll
you really had two roads in hand?
Please more of that and I might be able t9 do something
Green your set up is great lol
I didnt expect to have the best road mats on the board lol
I th8nk hes repaying for the no plow lol
I might need to aggressive knight red
Can I have the wheat black if I move knight?
Red u got city on wheat with port, best ore, and 3 devs
Give ya an one there too for youre troubles lol
These 3s are the only reason I have a game lol
will be lovely when green double plays
you have army already...esy connect for road
Yeah im sure the 11 and 3 will roll endlessly

U are about to have 2 knights to my 2, and u have more devs than me
Im not beating blacks road production

you keep soloing me, so i respond
Cause im fighting u for army
Okay well dont ask me to fight road if you won't help even slightly
